title: crotalaria martiana subsp. mohlenbrockii
intro: Crotalaria martiana subsp. mohlenbrockii, also known as Mohlenbrock's rattlebox, is a flowering plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria martiana subsp. mohlenbrockii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
